generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when Hurricane Katrina hit and the government was completely unprepared? We can't let that happen again. Local communities need to step up their civil defense preparedness. The federal government can't be trusted to have our backs when it counts. It's time for us to take responsibility for our own safety. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
